answer: The 2024 Summer Olympics were held in Paris, France, from July 26 to August 11. Paris hosted the event, marking the centenary of the 1924 Games. The Games featured 50 percent female athletes, achieving gender equality.

results.snippet: The Summer Olympics 2024 will be held in Paris, France, from 26 July to 11 August, marking the centenary of the 1924 Games in the same city.

results.title: 10 Surprising Facts About Paris, the Host City of the 2024 Olympics
results.snippet: Paris will be home to the 2024 Summer Olympic Games held from July 26 to Aug. 11. It will then host the Paralympic Games from Aug. 28 to Sept. 8.

results.title: Paris 2024 Summer Olympics: Our Complete Guide | Condé Nast Traveler
results.snippet: # Paris 2024 Summer Olympics: Our Complete Guide. *Games wide open!* The Paris 2024 Summer Olympics are here—so, expect to hear the roar of that slogan in the weeks ahead. And the anticipation is palpable, as Paris has proved their forward-looking approach to being an Olympic host in the past: Women athletes were involved for the first time ever at the 1900 Paris Olympic Games, and this year, 50 percent of the athletes are women, making Paris the first host to achieve gender equality in Games history. Consider this your all-in-one Paris 2024 Summer Olympics guide. Paris will play host to the 2024 Summer Olympics. A total of 20 out of the 35 venues being used as Olympic Games locations are in and around central Paris. ## More stories from the Paris 2024 Olympics. ## Planning your trip to the Paris 2024 Summer Olympics. The Grand Palais museum in Paris is set to re-open just in time for the Summer 2024 Olympics, after a four-year transformation.
